2025-26 Utah Jazz Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 22-60, Finished 15th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Will Hardy (22-60)

Executive: Danny Ainge

PTS/G: 117.6 (9th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 126.0 (30th of 30)

SRS: -8.04 (27th of 30) Pace: 102.3 (3rd of 30)

Off Rtg: 114.1 (22nd of 30) Def Rtg: 122.3 (29th of 30) Net Rtg: -8.2 (27th of 30)

Expected W-L: 23-59 (27th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000, Over-Under 18.5

Arena: Delta Center Attendance: 745,626 (15th of 30)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.
